name: property managers processing 5–15 utility invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility invoices/month, manual compilation causes reporting delays. We automate the report generation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem_solved: Manual compilation of utility expenses leads to errors and delays in reporting.
